scope: MMM Phase 3 retrofit — 12 pre-build artifacts + 2 new files + governance ceremony
description: Retrofit all 12 MMM pre-build artifacts to absorb full-functional-delivery governance standard. Adds Functional Delivery Definition, CTA/API matrix, live-action acceptance criteria, typed integration client law, CTA-verification RED tests, FFD PBFAG gate, wave completion standard, anti-placeholder builder affirmations, IAA delivery mandate, role assignment matrix, and Functional Delivery Evidence Pack requirement.
